# What Is Enlightenment?

*[Kant](../philosophers/kant.md) · 1784*

A famous short essay where Kant defines Enlightenment as the human being's emergence from his self-incurred immaturity, under the motto "Sapere aude". It distinguishes the public use of reason, which must be free, from its private use.
